name: @umbry/desktop
description: Umbry desktop shell (Electron) — loads the web app in a hardened window.
author: Umbry <noreply@umbry.chat>

scripts.dist: pnpm bundle:web && pnpm bundle:relay && tsc -p tsconfig.json && electron-builder
scripts.dist:win: pnpm bundle:web && pnpm bundle:relay && tsc -p tsconfig.json && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:mac: pnpm bundle:web && pnpm bundle:relay && tsc -p tsconfig.json && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:linux: pnpm bundle:web && pnpm bundle:relay && tsc -p tsconfig.json && electron-builder --linux
